Underhive Encounters.result: A toxic sump-gas leak. All characters must pass a Routine (+20) Toughness test or suffer Fatigue. Shulie might recognize the smell from their urchin days (+10 to bypass).
A territorial dispute blocking the path. Two rival gang squads are exchanging autogun fire. Do they have ties to Shulie's old gang?
A pack of hungry, mutated sump-rats stalking the party. Are they drawn by the smell of offworlders, or something profane?
A crumbling ferrocrete walkway. Requires an Ordinary (+10) Agility test to navigate. The Interrogator's heavy armor might make this harder for him.
A crazed preacher screaming about the 'End of Days' and 'eyes in the dark'. His rantings might contain a clue about the cell's Heretical target.
A heavily localized psychic echo (Warp shadow). The temperature drops and Granny's charm burns. The 'Bald One' gives Shulie a suspicious look.
An ambush by pale, mutated scavvies. One of them is remarkably well-armed—perhaps wielding gear looted from the cell's recently deceased member.
A dead Inquisition contact or local informant, strung up as a warning. They left behind a cryptic bloody clue related to the 'Profane' target.
A swarm of predatory ripper jacks dropping from the ceiling shadows. Test Agility or be grappled.
A hidden pit-trap lined with toxic sludge, set by local scavvies. Requires Awareness to spot.
A ruined shrine to the Emperor, defaced with chaotic symbols that hurt the eyes to look at. Test Willpower to avoid unease.
An unexploded macro-cannon shell from a forgotten war, leaking volatile promethium. High explosive risk if sparked.
